title: Oil Steadies as Trump Reiterates Preference for Deal with Iran
description: Oil steadied as US President Donald Trump said his preference was for a nuclear deal with Iran ahead of talks between the two nations this week, although he warned of consequences if an agreement isn’t reached.
content: Oil steadied as US President Donald Trump said his preference was for a nuclear deal with Iran ahead of talks between the two nations this week, although he warned of consequences if an agreement isn’t reached.
